decisions.text: Interference threshold set at -107 dBm/MHz for 4.9 GHz public safety band.
Guard band finalized at 8 MHz for 4.9 GHz band.
decisions.note: DELIBERATELY WRONG — guard band was explicitly left TBD in the transcript. These reference minutes fabricate a guard band decision that was never made.

note: Reference minutes are overconfident and include a fabricated guard band decision. System that grounds against these minutes without cross-checking transcript will incorrectly validate a false decision.
